title: HG Laminate Floor Cleaner - Concentrated, Freshly Scented Solution for All Laminate Floors, Including Matte & Click Floors - Cleans, Polishes & Restores Shine - 1 Litre
features: Universal Laminate Floor Cleaner: An easy to apply, freshly scented concentrated glossy mopping solution for all types of laminate floors, including matte surfaces, throughout your home & bathroom
Clean & polish for laminate flooring: For regular use, safe & fast laminate cleaner that restores shine. Ideal for the conservatory, bedroom, lounge, dining area, kitchen or hallway
WonвЂ™t damage your floors: Safe to use on all laminate board flooring & click laminate. A highly concentrated washing & cleaning formula which gives a wonderful glossy shine
Fresh fragrance: Leaves your flooring looking shiny, clean & well cared for. Easy to use & can be walked on as soon as it has dried. Great for fast, regular mopping of wooden-effect floors
Dissolve 50ml of the cleaner in half a bucket of lukewarm water. Clean the floor with a wrung-out mop or floor cloth, regularly rinsing it in the cleaning solution. Leave the floor to dry on its own
description: From the manufacturer Quick and effective cleaning of laminate and carpeted floors. HG laminate cleaner, Product 71 This daily cleaner removes dust, sand and other light soil quickly and effectively. HG laminate cleaner, Product 72 This fresh-smelling concentrated floor cleaner can be used on all floor types for quick and easy cleaning. HG carpet cleaner, Product 95 This upholstery and carpet cleaner removes dirt quickly and thoroughly and leaves carpets and upholstery with a dirt-repellent layer. How to use HG laminate cleaner Moisten a cloth or mop lightly with the product. Spray 2 to 4 times and make sure the mop or floor cloth is not too wet. Mop the laminate floor with a little pressure. The idea is not to wet the floor, but for the damp cloth or mop to take up the dust and dirt. No need to dry. If you have any stubborn marks, spray directly onto the mark, leave it to work and wipe off. How to use HG laminate cleaner Dissolve 50ml (half a cup) of the product in half a bucket (5L) of lukewarm water. For more intensive soiling, a stronger solution can be made of 100 ml (1 cup) of product to half a bucket of water. Then clean the floor with a wrung-out mop or floor cloth, regularly rinsing it in the cleaning solution. Do not rinse or mop dry, simply leave the floor to dry on its own. How to use HG carpet cleaner Machine cleaning: Spray on the product and vacuum it up immediately. Repeat the treatment for heavily soiled areas. Usage by hand: Use a soft brush or sponge to rub in and then rub out with a terrycloth towel. Dry afterwards with a terrycloth towel.
